assertions.title: Convoy execution blocks downstream tasks until dependencies pass

steps.action: Navigate to Autopilot tab for assigned project
steps.observed: Autopilot tab loaded with settings, ideas, and swipe sections

steps.expected: Convoy task graph with blocked/unblocked states
steps.observed: Delivery Runs section found with empty state 'No delivery runs yet.'

evidence.consoleErrors: Unauthenticated OIDC token errors (expected for unauthenticated API calls), response.clone errors, stack overflow errors
evidence.network: No delivery run API endpoints found (tried /api/autopilot/delivery-runs)

assertions.issues: No delivery runs exist in the project to test convoy blocking behavior. The prerequisite idea->swipe->planning flow (VAL-AUTOPILOT-030) was previously blocked, preventing any delivery runs from being created.

assertions.title: Checkpoint and resume restore run state

steps.action: Navigate to Delivery Runs section in Autopilot tab
steps.observed: No delivery runs exist - empty state shown

assertions.issues: No checkpoint data available to test resume functionality. Blocked by VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 prerequisite.

assertions.title: Merge coordination prevents conflicting run completion

steps.observed: No delivery runs exist - cannot test merge coordination

evidence.network: N/A - no runs to test merge conflicts

assertions.issues: No conflicting delivery runs available to test merge coordination. Blocked by VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 prerequisite.

assertions.title: Operator interventions are available during active runs

steps.observed: No delivery runs exist - empty state

evidence.network: N/A - no active runs for intervention

assertions.issues: No active delivery runs available for operator intervention testing. Blocked by VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 prerequisite.

blockers.description: VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 (Planning flow for approved ideas) is blocked in round 3 validation - the idea->swipe->planning flow was not fully exercised. This cascades to all delivery-control assertions (035-038) which require actual delivery runs to exist before convoy execution, checkpoint/resume, merge coordination, or operator interventions can be tested.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Browsed Autopilot tab thoroughly - confirmed UI is properly rendered with Enable Product Autopilot, tier selector (Supervised/Semi-Auto/Full Auto), Budget settings, Product Program editor, Research section, Ideas section with Pass/Maybe/Yes/Now swipe buttons, and Delivery Runs section showing empty state. No delivery runs are present because the prerequisite idea creation and approval flow has not been completed.

summary: Tested 4 assertions (VAL-AUTOPILOT-035 through VAL-AUTOPILOT-038): all blocked. All four assertions require delivery runs to exist, but no delivery runs are present because the prerequisite idea->swipe->planning flow (VAL-AUTOPILOT-030) was not exercised in prior validation rounds. The Autopilot tab UI is fully functional and rendering correctly, but the empty delivery runs state prevents testing of convoy execution, checkpoint/resume, merge coordination, and operator interventions.
